name: Mango Lassi
steps: Blend mango chunks with yogurt until smooth.
Add milk and sugar, blend again.
Pour into glasses and serve chilled with a pinch of cardamom.

name: Masala Chai
steps: Boil water with crushed ginger and cardamom.
Add tea leaves and simmer for 2 minutes.
Add milk and sugar, boil once more, strain and serve hot.

name: Paneer Butter Masala
steps: Saute onions in butter until golden.
Add tomato puree and spices, cook for 5 minutes.
Add paneer cubes and cream, simmer for 10 minutes and serve.

name: Dark Chocolate Mug Cake
steps: Mix all dry ingredients in a mug.
Add milk and oil, stir until smooth.
Microwave for 90 seconds and enjoy warm.

name: Fruity Vegan Smoothie
steps: Add berries, banana and chia seeds to blender.
Pour in almond milk and maple syrup.
Blend until smooth and serve immediately.

name: Oats Porridge
steps: Cook oats in almond milk on low heat for 5 minutes.
Stir in cinnamon and a drizzle of honey.
Top with sliced banana and serve warm.

name: Avocado Toast
steps: Toast bread slices until golden and crisp.
Mash avocado with lemon juice and salt.
Spread on toast and sprinkle chili flakes on top.

name: Chicken Soup
steps: Boil chicken with onion, garlic and carrot for 30 minutes.
Remove chicken, shred it and return to pot.
Season with salt and pepper and serve hot.

name: Spicy Egg Fried Rice
steps: Heat oil in a wok and scramble eggs lightly.
Add cooked rice and stir-fry on high heat.
Add soy sauce, chili and spring onion, toss well and serve.

name: Grilled Chicken Wrap
steps: Grill marinated chicken breast for 8 minutes each side.
Slice chicken and place on tortilla with lettuce and tomato.
Drizzle mayonnaise, roll tightly and serve.
